summary: Iteration 62: CRITICAL FONT AUDIT PART 2 - Trust subpage H1 fix VERIFIED. FOUND 6 authenticated pages with unreadable dark green text (#0f2f24) on dark Liquid Steel theme. These pages were designed for light theme but render inside DashboardLayout with dark background (#0F1720).

ui_bugs.issue: ALL text uses hardcoded dark green #0f2f24 which is INVISIBLE on dark Liquid Steel theme (#0F1720). H1 'Market Analysis' has color rgb(15,47,36) - nearly same as background.

ui_bugs.fix_required: Replace all text-[#0f2f24] with text-[#F4F7FA] and text-[#0f2f24]/60 with text-[#9FB0C3]

root_cause_analysis.issue: 6 pages were designed with a LIGHT theme color scheme (#0f2f24 = dark green text on white/cream background) but they render inside DashboardLayout which enforces the dark Liquid Steel theme (#0F1720 background).

fix_pattern.should_be: text-[#F4F7FA] for headings, text-[#9FB0C3] for body, text-[#64748B] for muted

action_items: CRITICAL: Replace ALL instances of text-[#0f2f24] with text-[#F4F7FA] in the 6 affected files
CRITICAL: Replace ALL instances of text-[#0f2f24]/60 and text-[#0f2f24]/70 with text-[#9FB0C3]
CRITICAL: Replace ALL instances of text-[#0f2f24]/40 with text-[#64748B]
CRITICAL: Check .card-clean class and bg-white/bg-[#f5f5f0] styles - may need to use dark bg instead
Use global search: grep -r 'text-\[#0f2f24\]' /app/frontend/src/pages/ to find all instances
Reference AdvisorWatchtower.js and AdminDashboard.js for correct Liquid Steel dark theme colors
critical_code_review_comments: These 6 pages were likely built before the dark theme migration and never updated
The pages use .card-clean and bg-white which creates light cards with dark text - this design conflicts with dark layout
Consider: Either convert pages to full dark theme OR add internal white containers for light theme sections
The Liquid Steel color palette is: #F4F7FA (white text), #9FB0C3 (body text), #64748B (muted), #FF6A00 (accent), #0F1720 (background)

success_rate.frontend: Trust H1 fix: 100% (5/5 pass). Authenticated pages: 50% (7 pass, 6 fail due to dark green text)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust subpage H1 fix verified. 6 authenticated pages need color migration from #0f2f24 (light theme dark green) to Liquid Steel dark theme colors (#F4F7FA headings, #9FB0C3 body). Affected: MarketAnalysis.js, Analysis.js, SOPGenerator.js, DataCenter.js, Documents.js, DocumentView.js. Other pages like AdvisorWatchtower, Settings, Integrations, SoundBoard, Admin already use correct dark theme colors.
